speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Kal raat sasu-maa ne phir se taana maara ki meri wajah se meri nanad ke rishtey baar-baar toot rahe hain kyunki hamari kundali mein hi dosh hai. Main itni zyada toot chuki hoon ki bas subah se roye ja rahi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki rasoi ka kaam kaise shuru karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional overwhelm to make seeker feel heard
text: Aapki baatein sunkar lag raha hai ki andar se aap poori tarah toot chuki hain aur ro-ro kar sach mein aapka ekdum se overwhelm ho jana samajh aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Haan, bas ek gehra andhera dikh raha hai. Aisa lag raha hai ki main hi is ghar ke liye manhoos hoon. Jab dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai toh rasoi mein kadam rakhne ki himmat nahi ho rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational element of feeling blamed
text: Sasu-maa ki aise taane sunkar aapko yeh mehsoos hone laga hai ki jaise is poore parivar ka bura aapki wajah se ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sab yahi sochte hain. Agar kisi padosi ne sun liya toh kya izzat reh jayegi hamari joint family ki? Mujhe dar lagta hai ki koi aur sun lega toh woh bhi mujhe doshi manega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge stigma softly and keep response short
text: Baahar walo ko pata chalne ka darr aapko andar hi andar aur pareshan kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sach kahu toh nanad ki kundali ka dosh mere sar par aa gaya hai. Main toh bas ek bahu hoon. Jabse aayi hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai yeh sab jhelte jhelte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore duration since restatements yield no new insight
text: Itne samay se jab aisi baatein chal rahi hain, toh aap khud ko is sab ke beech kaise sambhal rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan rahi hoon? Bas lagta hai kabhi kabhi ki sab khatam kar doon, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa jata hai. Itne taane sunkar thak chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalise mild risk and mirror feeling of exhaustion and fear
text: Kabhi kabhi itna bojh ho jata hai ki aisi baatein mann mein aana swabhavik hai, aapko lag raha hai ki shayad aur koi rasta hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, koi raasta nahi dikhta. Sasu-maa sara din bas yahi yaad dilati hain ki meri kismat kharab hai aur uska asar nanad par pad raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect underlying trapped emotion in relational frame
text: Lagta hai aap is rishtey mein poori tarah fasa hua aur bebas mehsoos kar rahi hain, kyunki bina aapki galti ke sara dosh aap par daal diya ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Bebas hi hoon. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti kyunki aurton ki aisi baatein ghar ke bahar jaye toh ghar walo ki hi badnaami hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handle stigma cue with soft shorter mirror
text: Bahu hone ki wajah se ghar ki izzat bachane ki zimmedari bhi aapko chup rehne par majboor kar rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh meri sabse badi dikkat hai. Ek taraf sasu-maa ke taane aur dusri taraf ghar sambhalne ka pressure.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the experience in her cultural context
text: Bahu ke role mein aisa dosh thop dena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein auraton ko hi adjustment karne ko kaha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sun kar thoda theek laga ki main akeli nahi hoon jiske sath yeh ho raha hai. Par roz roz taane sun kar dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai, bas rota hi rehta hai dil.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth separate from the outcome
text: Lagta hai roz in baaton se nipatna asaan nahi hai, par ek baat yaad rakhiye, kisi ke rishtey banne ya bigadne mein aapki kundali ka dosh nahi, yeh aapki kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain. Par main kya karoon? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka ki khud ko kaise shant karun aaj ke din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give 2-3 manageable suggestions fitting her role
text: Abhi ke liye, jab aap rasoi mein jayein toh ek minute bas wahan khidki ke paas khade ho kar lambi saans lijiye, ya phir sabzi katte waqt apna dhyan sirf usi kaam par lagane ki koshish kijiye bina soche.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lambi saans lene wala try kar sakti hoon. Kaam toh karna hi hai, chulha toh jalana hi padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one step
text: Pehle rasoi mein jaane se pehle muh par thanda pani mariye… phir bas chulhe ke paas ja kar thoda time lijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, thanda pani mar kar dekhti hoon. Abhi rona thoda band hua hai aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of her category
text: Aksar humari society mein shadi aur rishton ka pressure asaan nishana dhundhta hai, aur bahu par kundali ka dosh laga dena sabse aam tarika hai apna tension nikalne ka.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Sach hi kaha, jab kuch na ho toh bahu hi manhoos nazar aati hai. Ab samajh aa raha hai thoda. Varna toh dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya tha subah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the shift in her perspective
text: Subah se jo pareshani aap pichle kayi ghanton se akele jhel rahi thi, woh ab dhire dhire thodi kam mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dhire dhire karke din toh nikalna hi hoga. Nanad ka kal dusra rishta dekhne wale aayenge. Phir tention hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the upcoming anxiety softly
text: Kal naye mehmaan aane ki baat soch kar hi aapko aage aane wale taano ka dar dobara lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dar toh lagta hai, par ab sochungi ki yeh sab unka tension nikalne ka tareeka hai, meri sachai nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her new coping thought
text: Bohot achhi baat hai ki aap in cheezon ko is nariye se dekh pa rahi hain ki unka gussa asal mein aapki galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas aisi hi himmat rakhni padegi, bacchon ko bhi dekhna hai school se aayenge ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her role-based resilience
text: Bacchon ki maa hone ki jo zimmedari hai, wahi aapko is mushkil mahol mein chalte rehne ki taqat de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha apne. Maa hoon, kamzor nahi pad sakti poori tarah. Ab uthti hoon kaam ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One more systemic note and encouragement
text: Humare samaj mein mahilayein apne bacchon ke sahare hi badi se badi pareshaniyan nikal leti hain, yeh aapki bahot badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai
text: Ji, dhanyawad itni der sunne ke liye. Varna dimaag ekdum sunn ho gaya hai aaj mera, lag raha tha pagla jaungi ro ro kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her relief
text: Itna ghutan bhara mehsoos hone ke baad ab thoda sa mann halka lagna ek rahat ki baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, mann sach mein thoda halka hai. Ab rotiyan bana lungi bina roye. Aur dhyan sabzi pe hi rakhungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the action she is about to take
text: Apne kaam ke madhyam se aap khud ko un baaton ke asar se door rakhne ka achha prayas kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai, main chalti hoon rasoi ki taraf. Agar phir pareshani hui toh aapse hi baat karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End on a supportive and reaffirming note
text: Main hamesha yahan hoon sunne ke liye, aap jab chahein bina kisi sankoch ke mujhe apni baat aakar bata sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Main itni ghabrahat mein hoon ki meri saans phool rahi hai, bas ek kone mein baith kar sisak rahi hoon aur kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri koi pehchan hi nahi bachi, bas rona nikal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intense emotional flood and physical overwhelm without rushing to the cause.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar ek bohot bada toofan chal raha hai jisne aapko puri tarah se gher liya hai, aur is waqt bas aansu hi nikal rahe hain bina kisi control ke.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Haan, bilkul yahi ho raha hai. Andar ekdum se ajeeb si becheni hai. Ekdum se kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas lag raha hai main sabke samne fail ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the implied fear of failure and letting others down.
text: Yeh feeling ki aap dusron ki nazron mein shayad poori nahi utar payi hain, aapko aur bhi zyada akela aur ghabraya hua mehsoos kara rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki raat ko pati se bahut behas hui thi. Unhone seedha keh diya ki meri career gap aur badhte wazan ki wajah se log hamari family ki baatein karte hain aur rishtey laut jate hain. Yeh sunkar lagta hai sasural mein meri koi izzat nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, shorter mirror focusing on the relational impact.
text: Pati ki unn baaton ne aapko yeh mehsoos karaya ki sasural mein aapki jagah aur izzat dono kam ho gayi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Exactly. Maine pehle kaam choda kyuki unko support chahiye tha, aur ab meri pehchan hi yahi ban gayi hai. Log kya kahenge ki tension mein unhone mujhe itna suna diya ki ab kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Two restatements failed to lower intensity, asking a gentle question to explore the impact on her identity.
text: Jab unhone aapke sacrifice ko samajhne ke bajaye aapke wazan aur gap par sawal uthaya, toh us pal aapke andar chal raha woh toofan kaisa lag raha tha?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa laga jaise zameen khisak gayi. Main raat bhar so nahi payi, sirf roti rahi. Kabhi lagta hai yahan rehne ka kya fayda jab koi meri value hi nahi samajhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity dropped to 3 and core conflict is named, reflecting quiet resignation.
text: Thodi der ke liye aapke shabdon se ek gheri bebasi aur chup chaap sab kuch chhod dene wali feeling jhalak rahi hai, jahan aap khud ki value dhundhte dhundhte thak chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Thak toh gayi hoon main. Par phir sochti hoon, maa baap ko pata chalega toh unhe kitni sharam aayegi ki unki beti ki career aur pehchan sab khatam ho gayi. Yehi dar dimaag mein ghoomta rehta hai aur aage kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue softly to allow her to feel safe.
text: Apne maa baap ki izzat aur unki takleef ke baare mein soch kar aap khud ki pareshani ko daba rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main apni pareshani kisko batau? Sab yahi kahenge ki shadi ke baad thoda adjust toh karna padta hai, auraton ko compromise karna hi padta hai sasural mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the structural issue women face in marriage and career gaps.
text: Working auraton ke role mein aisa career gap hone par taane sunna bahot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki humare samaj mein mahilaon ke sacrifices ko aksar nazarandaz kar diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Sach mein aisa hi hota hai. Sab kuch de diya is rishtey ko, aur aaj woh log mujh par hi ungli utha rahe hain kyunki unki social standing affect ho rahi hai. Ye sab soch kar kabhi kabhi kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth irrespective of her weight or employment status.
text: Aapka jo yeh dukh hai, woh puri tarah se jayaz hai, kyunki jab apne hi log sath na dein toh dard zyada hota hai, par yaad rakhiye aapki pehchan aapke wazan ya unki soch se tay nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain. Mera wazan badhna ya break lena meri value kam nahi kar deta. Par main theek hona chahta hoon aur samajhna chahti hoon ki ab kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps since intensity is 2 and readiness is signaled.
text: Aaj ka din shant karne ke liye, kya aap thodi der ke liye sirf ek cup chai lekar akele baithna pasand karengi, ya phir kisi aisi dost se thodi der normal baat karna jo aapko bina judge kiye sunti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek cup chai lekar akele baithna shayad theek rahega. Dost se baat karne ki himmat nahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen step clearly and simply.
text: Pehle ek glass paani pijiye, phir aram se apne liye ek cup chai banaiye… aur apni pasand ki jagah par chup chaap thodi der baithiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Haan, main chai banati hoon apne liye. Varna jis tarah main sisak rahi thi, kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the shift from overwhelm to a small action.
text: Jo darr aur ghutan pichle kuch ghanton se aapko ghere hue thi, usme ab ek chhota sa kadam aapko thodi raahat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi samjha. Bas chai peete peete main apne baare mein acha sochne ki koshish karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on how marriage pressure shifts blame.
text: Humare society mein log aksar rishton ke tutne ka asan nishana mahilaon aur unke career ya body par dal dete hain, yeh unka ek tarika hota hai apna frustration nikalne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Unka frustration mujh par nikalta hai. Ab main khud ko is cheez ke liye dosh nahi dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reaffirm her realization and strength.
text: Yeh badlaav dekh kar bohot accha lag raha hai ki aap unke shabdon se apni keemat ko alag karke dekh pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Jab baat shuru hui thi toh bilkul dhundhla tha, kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha tha. Ab kam se kam saans toh chal rahi hai normal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge physical state relaxing.
text: Jo saans phool rahi thi aur ghabrahat thi, woh dhire dhire ek thehraav mein badal rahi hai aapke andar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bas aaj thoda waqt apne sath bitaungi. Baaki cheezein baad mein dekh lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her plan to take time for herself.
text: Baaki saari zimmedariyon ko thodi der ke liye piche chhod kar, aap abhi khud ko samay dena chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main rasoi mein jati hoon pani aur chai ke liye. Shukriya mujhe sunne ke liye, bohot behtar lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final encouraging systemic note.
text: Hamari koshishein aur career ke sacrifice ko samajhna sabke bas ki baat nahi, par aap khud ko samajh rahi hain, yahi sabse badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai
text: Jeet toh kya, bas aaj sambhalna tha. Jab rona nikal raha tha, lag raha tha sach mein kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai. Ab aage ki soch sakti hoon thoda.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the return of her ability to think.
text: Us gehre andhere se nikal kar ab aap aage ki taraf dobara dekhne ke kabil mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Kabhi kisi se aisi baat nahi ki itni khul ke, kyunki log kya kahenge yeh darr rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her courage to speak despite the fear of judgment.
text: Samaj ki in baaton ka darr hona bilkul swabhavik hai, par aapne phir bhi khud ko express karne ki jo himmat dikhayi hai woh bahot ahem hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne himmat badhayi hai meri. Main chahti hoon aage bhi kabhi zaroorat pade toh aapse hi baat karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her trust.
text: Aapko is baat-cheet se jo bharosa mila hai, usne aage ke liye ek surakshit jagah bana di hai aapke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ab main apni chai pee lungi aaram se. Bohot shukriya aapka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End warmly and reaffirm presence.
text: Main yahan humesha uplabdh hoon, aap jab bhi dobara baat karna chahein, bina soche aakar bata sakti hain, apna khayal rakhiye aaj.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai, main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki na bacchon ko tiffin diya ja raha hai na ghar sambhala ja raha hai. Bas rone ka mann kar raha hai aur lag raha hai ki main sabke liye bas ek bojh ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep emotional flood and physical overwhelm without asking for the cause yet.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar ek bhayankar toofan chal raha hai jiske bojh tale aap bilkul dab si gayi hain, aur is waqt sirf aansu hi nikal rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, aansu ruk hi nahi rahe hain subah se. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai soch soch kar. Lagta hai main is parivar ke kisi layak hi nahi bachi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of being a burden and unworthy.
text: Yeh darr ki shayad aap apno ke liye ek rukawat ya bojh ban rahi hain, aapko aur bhi zyada andar se tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyun nahi darr lagega? Kal raat ki ladaai ke baad Mummy-ji ne bol diya ki dowry ki baatein toh bahana hain, asli wajah meri nakaami hai ki har rishta reject ho raha hai. Samajh nahi aata kisi ko kya shakal dikhaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue about rishta rejection with a soft, shorter relational mirror.
text: Mummy-ji ki in chubhti baaton ne aapko yeh mehsoos karaya ki rishtey tootne ka sara kalank aapke hi sar par daal diya gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Saara kasoor mera hi toh nikalte hain. Ek toh akele bacchon ka pressure jhel rahi hoon, upar se yeh saas-bahu dynamics. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai taane sunte sunte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a gentle question exploring her dual burden since two restatements passed.
text: Ek taraf bacchon ki zimmedari aur dusri taraf roz aisi chubhti hui baatein, in dono ke beech jab aap pis rahi hoti hain toh kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas aisa lagta hai ki main bahut buri maa hoon. Tiffin banane tak ki himmat nahi hui aaj. Bacchon ki aankhon mein dekhti hoon toh andar se sharam aati hai ki main unhe kya future de rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her role-based guilt as a mother.
text: Bacchon ki achhi maa banne ki jo aapki koshish hai, wahi aapko is pal sabse zyada guilty aur majboor mehsoos kara rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Guilty aur sharminda dono. Jab log kehte hain ki teri nakaami ki wajah se rishtey laut rahe hain, toh lagta hai ki sach mein mujhme hi koi badi khot hai. Bas chup chap akele ro leti hoon ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the 'quiet resignation' emotion specified for C3+Sequential.
text: Lagta hai ek chup-chaap sehne wali lachaari aur thehri hui udasi mein aap khud ko akele pa rahi hain, jahan ab apne aapko defend karne ki taqat bhi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, chup rehne ke alawa aur koi chara bhi toh nahi hai. Taqat toh jaise khatam hi ho chuki hai aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Kaise is daldal se bahar aaungi, kuch nahi pata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the blame put on single mothers using the cultural template.
text: Akele bacchon ko paalne wali maa ke role mein aise rishtey reject hone par khud ko doshi manna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj humesha mahilaon ko hi unki har pareshani ka kasoorwar thehrata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sun kar sach mein thodi rahat mili ki main is ghutan mein akeli nahi hoon. Par Mummy-ji ki baatein bahut buri tarah chubhti hain. Jab woh 'bojh' word use karti hain na, toh dil baith jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth separate from the outcome and her in-laws' words.
text: Aapka rona aur is tarah hurt hona poori tarah jayaz hai, kyunki jab apne ghar ke log aisi kadwi baatein karein toh dard zyada hota hai, par yaad rakhiye aapka wajood aur bacchon ki maa hona kisi bhi tarah se bojh nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash woh log bhi yeh choti si baat samajh paate. Par unko bas yehi lagta hai ki mera yahan baithe rehna unke parivar pe kalank jaisa hai. Yeh saari andar ki baatein main bahar kisi ko nahi bata sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and secrecy with a gentle, short mirror.
text: Itne lambe samay se is kalank ke darr ko society ke samne chupana aapko andar hi andar poori tarah thaka raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan... bas ab aur zyada nahi sochna chahti un sab baaton ko. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai inhi wajhon se. Batao main abhi is waqt kya karoon jisse kam se kam apne bacchon ka tiffin toh bana sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, doable steps focusing on her immediate duty towards the kids.
text: Abhi bacchon ke liye bas do asaan raste try kar sakti hain — ya toh unko tiffin mein koi simple sa biscuit-fruit rakh dijiye aaj ke liye, ya phir muh par thanda pani maar kar bas ek sadha paratha bana lijiye bina zyada soche.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanda pani maar ke paratha banana theek rahega. Kam se kam unka pet toh ache se bharega, aur fruit bhi rakh dungi sath mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the chosen suggestion into a clear, simple step.
text: Pehle aaram se washroom ja kar thanda pani chehre par daliye… phir rasoi mein ja kar sirf aate ke dabbe par apna dhyan lagaiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main pani dalti hoon chehre par. Varna aise hi roti rahungi toh sach mein bacche school ke liye late ho jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on how dowry/rishta failures are often pinned on women.
text: Hamare yahan aksar dowry aur rishtey tootne ki pareshaniyon ka sara kalank auraton ki personal nakaami bata kar unpar hi daal diya jata hai, taaki baki system ki kamiyon se dhyan hat jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul sahi keh rahe hain. Yeh unki galat soch ka nateeja hai, meri 'nakaami' nahi. Mujhe sirf apne bacchon par dhyan dena hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her shifting focus to her kids.
text: Apne bacchon ka chehra yaad aate hi aap baki sab rishton ki chinta ko side mein rakh kar aage badhne ki himmat juta pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, wahi meri zindagi hain sach mein. Unko dekh kar yeh jo dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai wali feeling thi, woh kaafi kam hoti nazar aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the calming of the emotional flood.
text: Jo ek ghabrahat aur shunn hone wali feeling aapko poori tarah roke hue thi, usme ab ek thehrav aur choti si rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh bohot rahat mili hai aapse baat karke. Main toh khud ko is sab ke chakkar mein poori tarah galat aur buri maa maan baithi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her identity as a good mother despite the circumstances.
text: Aapne jis tarah is poori pareshani mein se bhi khud ko bahar nikal kar bacchon ke liye socha, yeh aapki sabse badi kamyabi hai, koi nakaami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya. Main ab unhi par dhyan lagana chahti hoon. Taane aayenge toh main aapas mein hi daba lungi baat ko, bacchon tak asar nahi aane dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her resilience in protecting her children.
text: Jab aap akelepan ke is darr ko sehti hain, tab bhi aapka poora dhyan yahi rehta hai ki aapke bacche kisi tarah surakshit rahein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bacchon ko school bhej kar phir shaanti se thodi der baith kar chai piyungi khud ke liye. Dimag thik karna zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforce the systemic reframe softly one last time.
text: Bina kisi galati ke itna bojh uthana aasan nahi hai, aur yeh samajhna zaruri hai ki society ka pressure humesha ek akele insaan par daal diya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Ekdam theek baat hai. Aaj subah toh lag raha tha jaise sab kuch khatam ho gaya aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai, par ab aage badhne ka raasta thoda saaf dikh raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her returning clarity.
text: Aaj ka din shuru karna jahan itna andhera lag raha tha, wahan ab wapas ek roshni si dikhayi de rahi hai aapko.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab kaafi behtar hai. Agar kal fir Mummy-ji ne kuch kaha, toh main khud ko galat nahi maanungi isme.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her growing self-trust.
text: Aapka yeh bharosa mujhe dikhata hai ki ab doosron ki baaton se aapka khud ka samman nahi tootega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Thank you itna time dene ke liye. Main ab aate ka dabba nikalti hoon aur kaam par lagti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close warmly affirming her strength and leaving the door open.
text: Main hamesha yahan uplabdh hoon sunne ke liye, aapne aaj jo himmat jutaai hai woh bahot badi baat hai, apna dhyan rakhiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Mera dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai ki main ek kadam bhi nahi chal pa rahi, bas sunn hokar leti hoon. Solution kya hoga ye toh bahut door ki baat hai, mujhe toh bas is waqt lag raha hai ki main kahin gayab ho jaun. Itna ajeeb sa toofan chal raha hai andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intense emotional overwhelm without rushing to the problem.
text: Aisa mehsoos ho raha hai ki aapke andar ek itna bhayankar toofan chal raha hai jiske bojh se aapka poora sharir aur mann bilkul thehar sa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Haan, bas sunn hokar leti hoon. Dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai ki kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Aisa lag raha hai mera koi wajood hi nahi bacha, meri pehchan hi khatam ho chuki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of lost identity and worth.
text: Yeh feeling ki ab shayad aapki koi identity nahi bachi aur aapne apna astitva kho diya hai, aapko andar hi andar aur akela kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki raat ko ladaai khatam hi nahi hui. Sasu-maa ne kaha ki 'log kya kahenge' ki is ghar ki aurat hi dhang ki nahi hai isliye rishta mana ho gaya. Meri wajah se sasural mein badnaami ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, shorter relational mirror.
text: Sasu-maa ke un shabdon ne aapko yeh mehsoos karaya ki rishta tootne ka saara kalank aur sasural ki izzat aapke hi sar par daal di gayi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Saara dosh mujh par hi nikalte hain. Main kitna bhi kar lu, unke hisaab se is ghar ki aurat dhang ki nahi hai. Dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai ki apni khud ki nazron mein gir gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore how she manages the burden since two restatements were used.
text: Jab apni itni koshishon ke bawajood aapko is tarah ka lanchhan aur dosh sehna padta hai, toh us gehre dard ke waqt aap khud ko kaise sambhalti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan pa rahi hoon? Bas chup chap kamre mein leti rehti hoon. Lagta hai main kisi kaam ki nahi. Lost identity jaisa lagta hai, jaise meri apni koi value hi na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect quiet resignation from sequential + C3 coping.
text: Lagta hai ek chup-chaap sehne wali lachaari aur shanti bhari udasi mein aap khud ko pa rahi hain, jahan ab apne aapko sahi sabit karne ki himmat bhi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Sahi kaha, himmat toh khatam ho chuki hai. Jab sasural wale hi 'log kya kahenge' bolkar meri pehchan mita dein, toh aur kya bachega? Kisi ko bahaar bhi nahi bata sakti izzat ki wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma and secrecy gently.
text: Apne andar ke is toofan aur sasural ki izzat ki baaton ko dusron se chupane ka dabaav aapko lagatar poori tarah thaka raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul thak gayi hoon main. Har rishte ke tootne ka karan mujh mein dhundhte hain. Mere wajood ka koi matlab hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the blame put on daughters-in-law in the cultural template.
text: Bahu ke role mein kisi bhi rishtey ke tootne ka sara dosh apne sar par lena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj humesha auraton ko hi ghar ki sabhi pareshaniyon ka kasoorwar manta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Aapki baatein sunkar lagta hai ki main sach mein shayed itni buri nahi hoon. Samaj aurton pe hi sari baatein phek deta hai. Par yeh soch soch kar dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai roz.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her worth separate from the outcome of the rishta.
text: Aapka khud ko is ghutan mein akela aur bebas mehsoos karna poori tarah jayaz hai, par ek baat yaad rakhiye, kisi aur ke rishtey ka faisla aapki keemat ya aapke wajood ko kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash Sasu-maa bhi yeh baat thodi samajh pate. Main is lost identity ke ehsaas se theek hona chahti hoon. Batao main kya karoon abhi, mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 quick, doable suggestions to help ground her.
text: Abhi khud ko shant karne ke liye aap do asaan chote kadam chun sakti hain—ya toh aaram se uthkar ek glass thanda pani pi lijiye dhire dhire, ya sirf apne face par pani maar kar khidki ke paas 5 minute khuli hawa khayiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Khidki ke paas khade hokar thodi taazi hawa khana theek rahega. Kyunki dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai ki shayad hawa se thoda hosh aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk her through the chosen step clearly.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her shifting perspective and reduced blame.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Jo ek ghabrahat aur thehrav wali shunn feeling aapko poori tarah roke hue thi, usme ab thodi si roshni aur rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot rahat mili hai aapki baaton se. Agar chup chap bistar pe hi padi rehti, toh sayad main andar hi andar ghut ke tut jati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her resilience in seeking clarity and standing up.
text: Jis tarah aapne apne liye khade hone ka aur is situation ko nayi nazar se dekhne ka faisla kiya hai, yeh aapki sabse badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main is taqat ko banaye rakhna chahti hoon. Aage log kya kahenge uski chinta mujhe kam karni hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her goal to let go of societal pressure.
text: Dusron ke taano aur duniya kya sochegi wale darr ko piche chhod kar, aap ab khud ko aage rakhna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Haan, main hi apne liye kafi hoon. Ab lagta hai jaise dhire dhire woh jo dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai, wo band ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One last systemic note to normalize her strength.
text: Society mein mahilayein apne andar ki chupi hui himmat se hi badi se badi pareshaniyan nikal leti hain, aaj aapne wohi himmat dikhayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bohot bohot shukriya itne pyaar se meri baat sunne ke liye. Main akeli itna sab manage nahi kar paati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge her relief and appreciation.
text: Apne is zimmedar aur mushkil role mein, kisi ko sacche dil se apni baat bata paane ne aapko wapas mazboot kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main rasoi mein ja kar kam se kam apne liye chai bana lungi ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her concrete next step.
text: Bistar par lagatar lete rehne ke baad ab aap apne liye kuch chhota sa kaam karne ke liye taiyaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai
text: Ji, jab dimaag itni buri tarah ghoom raha hai, tab apne haath se kuch banana shayad aur theek kar de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her self-care and action.
text: Khidki par hawa khana aur khud ke liye ek cup chai banana aapke khud ko dobara sambhalne ki bahot pyaari shuruat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Main chalti hoon. Agar phir se kabhi buri situations aayi toh aapse hi aakar baat karungi. Shukriya.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein cheekh rahi hain

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein cheekh rahi hain
text: Haan, rona ruk hi nahi raha. Dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein cheekh rahi hain lagatar. Aisa lagta hai ki mera is ghar mein rehna hi sabse badi galti hai.

speaker: Supporter
